sites.skills: Portage dam at Brainerd. Portage by dam is hazardous if the flow is greater than 7000 cfs. Swirling currents and class 3 rapids circulate back towards the dam spillway. Recommend not using the portage and taking out at Rice Lake (Lum Park) just above dam. The river can be accessed 1 1/4 mile downstream at Evergreen landing. NO shuttle available.
